purpose: This repository provides data models, entity configurations, and database context for the CRB.Cos.Lending.Selling system. It serves as a central database abstraction layer for managing loans, accounts, fees, transfers, and related entities in a lending and selling system, likely for financial institutions.

dataEntities.name: Loan
dataEntities.description: Represents a loan entity with its associated properties

dataEntities.name: Account
dataEntities.description: Represents a financial account in the system

dataEntities.name: Contract
dataEntities.description: Represents a contract agreement between parties

dataEntities.name: Fee
dataEntities.description: Represents fee information associated with loans or accounts

dataEntities.name: Transfer
dataEntities.description: Represents transfers of loans between entities

dataEntities.name: InterestHistory
dataEntities.description: Records interest calculations and history for loans

dataEntities.name: Investor
dataEntities.description: Represents investors who purchase or fund loans

dataEntities.name: Batch
dataEntities.description: Represents batch processing entities for loans

messagingPatterns.name: TransferOutbox
messagingPatterns.description: Outbox pattern for reliable transfer events publication

messagingPatterns.name: FeeOutbox
messagingPatterns.description: Outbox pattern for reliable fee events publication

messagingPatterns.name: BatchInitOutbox
messagingPatterns.description: Outbox pattern for reliable batch initialization event publication

messagingPatterns.name: DailyInterestOutbox
messagingPatterns.description: Outbox pattern for reliable daily interest calculation event publication

messagingPatterns.name: NotificationOutbox
messagingPatterns.description: Outbox pattern for reliable notification event publication

messagingPatterns.name: ReportingOutbox
messagingPatterns.description: Outbox pattern for reliable reporting event publication

messagingPatterns.name: MaturedLoanOutbox
messagingPatterns.description: Outbox pattern for reliable matured loan event publication

messagingPatterns.name: VolumeFeeOutbox
messagingPatterns.description: Outbox pattern for reliable volume fee event publication

messagingPatterns.name: TrueUpVolumeFeeOutbox
messagingPatterns.description: Outbox pattern for reliable true-up volume fee event publication

findings.title: Dead Letter Queues without processing strategy
findings.description: The system has numerous DeadLetter tables for failed outbox message processing, but there appears to be no clear strategy or automation for handling these failed messages, which could lead to data inconsistencies if not properly monitored and resolved.

findings.title: Multi-tenant data access control
findings.description: The TenantProvider implementation appears to handle multi-tenancy concerns, but the actual enforcement of tenant-based data isolation at the DbContext level isn't evident. This could potentially lead to tenants accessing other tenants' data if not properly implemented throughout the application.
